CustomField.description: Agency-specific median NOI-to-DEIS duration in months, sourced from NEPA_Agency_Scoping_Baseline__mdt. Set by NEPA_Timeline_Risk_Assessor for EIS processes. Used as the denominator for scoping overrun calculations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Median months from NOI to DEIS for the lead agency, based on CEQ EIS Timeline data 2010–2024.
CustomField.label: Agency Scoping Baseline (Months)
